calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar Dec-11-2007 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Judge Ollie Marie-Victoire, Clerk: Carla Amador & Sajja Ravinantapricha , CSR: Lavena Ward #7077 (Department 218)

Appearances:
Petitioners/Parents, Maria Juarez and Dilbert Iraheta, are appearing in propia persona on behalf of the two minor children, Dilbert Giovanny Iraheta and Bryan Iraheta Juarez. The two minors are not present.

Petitioner, Dilbert Iraheta, interprets from English to Spanish for Maria Juarez.

This matter comes on calendar this day for an Order to Show Cause hearing re Change of Name of a minor. Maria Juarez and Dilbert Iraheta are sworn and examined by the Court. Maria Juares testifies through the Spanish interpreter.

The matter having been submitted and no objections having been made to the change of name of the Minors at the hearing, it appears to the satisfaction of the Court that all the allegations in the petition are true, correct, and sufficient and that the petition should be granted.

The Court grants the petition for Change of Name of the minors to: DILBERT GIOVANNY IRAHETA JUAREZ and BRYAN JEREMY IRAHETA JUAREZ. Decree is submitted and signed in open court.
